# FoxBox

> Premium car storage facility in Dubai

FoxBox provides secure, professionally managed indoor storage for vehicles. Designed for owners who value protection, privacy, and peace of mind.

## Services

- **Auto Storage**: Secure indoor parking for cars, motorcycles, and other vehicles
- **Storage**: General storage units for personal and business use

## Features

- 24/7 access options
- Climate-controlled facility
- CCTV surveillance
- Flexible booking periods (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
- Online booking and payment
- Personal dashboard for managing bookings
- QR-code based visit access system
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

## Location

Dubai, United Arab Emirates

## Contact

- Website: https://foxbox.ae
- About: https://foxbox.ae/about/
- Contacts: https://foxbox.ae/contacts/

## Languages

Available in English, Russian, and Arabic.
